requestSchema.label: Endpoint URL
requestSchema.description: Full Anthropic Messages URL (e.g. http://localhost:4141/v1/messages). Use for proxies that speak the Anthropic Messages wire format (GitHub Copilot bridges, LiteLLM Anthropic passthrough, etc.).

descriptionI18n.ko: 전체 Anthropic Messages URL (예: http://localhost:4141/v1/messages). Anthropic Messages 포맷을 따르는 프록시용 (GitHub Copilot 브릿지, LiteLLM Anthropic 패스스루 등).

requestSchema.label: API Key
requestSchema.description: Sent as the x-api-key header. Leave empty only when using the no-auth profile.

descriptionI18n.ko: x-api-key 헤더로 전송됩니다. 인증 없는 프로파일을 쓸 때만 비워두세요.

requestSchema.label: Model ID
requestSchema.description: Model identifier accepted by the upstream endpoint (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-5).

descriptionI18n.ko: 상위 엔드포인트가 허용하는 모델 ID (예: claude-sonnet-4-5).

requestSchema.label: Max Tokens
requestSchema.description: Anthropic Messages requires max_tokens on every request.

descriptionI18n.ko: Anthropic Messages는 모든 요청에 max_tokens가 필요합니다.

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by the upstream endpoint and selected model, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

descriptionI18n.ko: Bedrock OpenAI 호환 chat completions URL (리전별).
Bedrock에서 발급한 Bearer 토큰 / API 키.

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by selected model or deployment, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

requestSchema.label: Model ID
requestSchema.description: Model identifier accepted by DeepInfra (e.g. meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct).

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by selected model or deployment, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

requestSchema.label: Reasoning Effort
requestSchema.description: Reasoning depth for thinking models. 'none' disables thinking.

descriptionI18n.ko: 추론(사고) 강도. thinking 모델에 적용 (none은 비활성).

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by selected model or deployment, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

requestSchema.label: Model ID
requestSchema.description: Cloud-hosted model. Local Ollama cloud models commonly use the :cloud suffix (e.g. gpt-oss:120b-cloud), while direct ollama.com API examples may use the bare model name (e.g. gpt-oss:120b). See https://ollama.com/search?c=cloud for the current list.

descriptionI18n.ko: 클라우드 호스팅 모델. 로컬 Ollama의 클라우드 모델은 보통 :cloud 접미사를 사용하지만(예: gpt-oss:120b-cloud), ollama.com 직접 API 예시는 접미사 없는 모델명도 사용합니다(예: gpt-oss:120b). 최신 목록은 https://ollama.com/search?c=cloud 참조.

requestSchema.label: Reasoning Effort
requestSchema.description: Reasoning depth for thinking models (gpt-oss, etc.). 'none' disables thinking.

descriptionI18n.ko: 추론(사고) 강도. gpt-oss 등 thinking 모델에 적용 (none은 비활성).

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by selected model or deployment, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

descriptionI18n.ko: Ollama OpenAI 호환 chat completions URL.

requestSchema.label: API Key (optional)
requestSchema.description: Only required if the Ollama server enforces a token.

descriptionI18n.ko: Ollama 서버가 토큰을 요구할 때만 필요합니다.

requestSchema.label: Context Window (num_ctx)
requestSchema.description: Model context window size in tokens. Overrides model default.

descriptionI18n.ko: 컨텍스트 윈도우 크기(토큰). 모델 기본값을 덮어씁니다.

requestSchema.label: Repeat Last N
requestSchema.description: Token window to consider for repeat penalty.

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by selected model or deployment, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

requestSchema.label: API Key
requestSchema.description: Bearer token. Leave empty for endpoints without auth.

descriptionI18n.ko: Bearer 토큰. 인증이 없는 엔드포인트는 비워두세요.

requestSchema.label: Model ID
requestSchema.description: Model identifier accepted by the upstream endpoint.

requestSchema.label: Top K
requestSchema.description: Some upstream providers (Together / Fireworks / DeepInfra) accept top_k.

descriptionI18n.ko: 일부 상위 공급자(Together / Fireworks / DeepInfra)는 top_k를 받습니다.
반복을 페널티 처리 (Together / Fireworks / vLLM 확장).

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by selected model or deployment, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

requestSchema.label: Reasoning Effort
requestSchema.description: Forward reasoning hints to compatible models.

requestSchema.label: Transforms
requestSchema.description: Content transforms (e.g. `middle-out` to compact long contexts).

descriptionI18n.ko: 공급자 라우팅 설정 (order, ignore, allow_fallbacks 등).

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by selected model or deployment, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

requestSchema.label: Reasoning Effort
requestSchema.description: Reasoning depth. The gateway maps this to each model's native thinking config (e.g. Gemini thinkingLevel/thinkingBudget, OpenAI reasoning effort).

descriptionI18n.ko: 추론(사고) 강도. 게이트웨이가 모델별 thinking 설정(Gemini thinkingLevel/thinkingBudget, OpenAI reasoning effort 등)으로 변환합니다.

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by selected model or deployment, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.

requestSchema.label: Service Account JSON
requestSchema.description: Full Service Account JSON for OAuth token exchange.

descriptionI18n.ko: OAuth 토큰 교환용 Service Account 전체 JSON.

requestSchema.label: Reasoning Effort
requestSchema.description: Reasoning depth. Maps to Gemini thinking_budget (2.5) / thinking_level (3.x).

limits.notes: Model-dependent provider. Context and output token limits vary by selected model or deployment, so PocketRisu uses a number input instead of a fixed-limit slider.
